overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk dystopian city environment. The player walks through elevated metal walkways past corrugated metal shanties, ascends a red staircase, and navigates through concrete back alleys with steam vents, graffiti, and a wrecked vehicle. High-quality game engine graphics with neon signage and wet reflective surfaces.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow elevated walkway made of metal grating, flanked by corrugated metal shanty structures with yellow roofing. The camera moves forward through this industrial corridor, with neon holographic signs visible in the distance against a partly cloudy sky.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a building entrance featuring a prominent red metal staircase on the right and a shop with a glowing red neon XXX sign. The metal walkway continues toward the entrance, passing by a vending machine storefront on the left.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the red metal staircase, with concrete walls on both sides. Steam vents are visible at the top of the stairs, and the shop entrance falls behind as the climb continues.

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a concrete rooftop platform, the scene features industrial elements including steam vents, a burning barrel, and a green dumpster. The camera moves past these elements toward a concrete overpass structure in the distance, with trash and debris scattered across the wet concrete surface.

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a narrow back alley with green graffiti-covered walls on the left and closed metal roll-up doors on the right. The camera approaches and passes a wrecked red car abandoned in the alley, with trash and debris scattered across the cobblestone ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated industrial walkway down into a gritty, debris-strewn urban alley. It begins by moving through a narrow corridor of metal grating and corrugated shanties under a cloudy sky, passing holographic signs and a vending machine storefront. As the camera reaches a building entrance marked by a glowing red neon sign, it ascends a red metal staircase flanked by concrete walls, leaving the shop behind. The scene then opens onto a wet rooftop platform where the camera glides past steam vents, a burning barrel, and a green dumpster toward a distant concrete overpass. Finally, the perspective shifts into a narrow back alley with green graffiti-covered walls and closed metal doors, passing a wrecked red car abandoned amidst scattered trash on the cobblestone ground.
